title: [rootless] stuck in container
body:
/kind bug

**Description**
With the latest version, I'm sometimes stuck in a container... Sometimes, I'm thrown out of the container after `apt update`.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
```
$ podman run --rm -ti nginx/unit:1.8.0-php7.0 bash

# and inside the container
apt update && apt install htop && htop
```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
INFO[0000] running as rootless
DEBU[0000] Initializing boltdb state at /home/podman/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod/bolt_state.db
```

comments.body:
what version of fuse-overlayfs are you using?

it looks like an issue I've fixed yesterday: https://github.com/containers/fuse-overlayfs/pull/63

It was introduced the day earlier and it is not part of any release yet
Hehe, I have built mine about 12 hours ago. So let me ride to my office and try it with the newer revision.
then I am quite sure that is fixed upstream :-)
@tobwen had a chance to check this issue?
